title: ardisia costaricensis
intro: Ardisia costaricensis, also known as Guayurim, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is native to Central America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. Ardisia costaricensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
